title: デビュー戦の後に・ホープの始動

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki was amazing out there! I have a feeling
she's got a lot of potential.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see how she does next year! I
wonder which races she'll run.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
That was an excellent debut race! Could you
please tell us how you feel?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'm honored that you enjoyed it.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
By the way... there's something I'm sure
everyone's dying to know.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: What's your plan moving forward?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That's a great question. The path I plan to take is
a thorny one that many before me have
attempted...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'm aiming to become a Triple Crown Champion!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Oooh!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I want to pit my talent, presence, and potential
against others upon that stage!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And once I have, I'll claim the exclusive title and
honor of being called a Triple Crown Champion!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you all the continuation of my slumbering
dream and what lies beyond a miracle!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! I'm very much looking forward to
watching your career unfold!

Fuji Kiseki's passionate words set the reporters'
pens racing across their notebooks so fast, I can
almost see smoke rising from the pages.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"Fuji Kiseki Aims for the Classic Triple Crown. Big
Dreams for This Year's Up-and-Comer."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ooh, they wrote a lot on me!

Fuji Kiseki's declaration generated a lot of buzz.
Everyone is talking about her in news articles and
on social media.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I wonder if I overdid it a bit.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: No, actually, I think that was perfect.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's expectations of me are the wind in my
sail. I must take advantage of such favorable
conditions and set off!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now, time to get serious and think about my next
race!

It'll be best for her to gain some experience since
she's aiming for the Classic Triple Crown. And for
that...
choice_data_list:
How about we take on the Asahi Hai Futurity
Stakes?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ah, a junior G1 race, huh?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Are you suggesting it so I can build up experience
for the big stage I'll be facing next year?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Got it. Let's work slow and steady toward our
goal!

Thus, our days of training for the Asahi Hai F.S.
begin!
